staging.placement_rm_monthly.purpose: Provides monthly snapshots of candidate placements with assigned relationship managers for tracking and performance analysis.
staging.placement_rm_monthly.grain: One row per placement per relationship manager per month

staging.placement_rm_monthly_manual.purpose: Manually maintained version of monthly placement and relationship manager assignments for manual overrides or corrections.
staging.placement_rm_monthly_manual.grain: One row per placement per relationship manager per month

target.placement_rm_history.purpose: Alternative or legacy version of historical tracking for relationship manager changes on placements.
target.placement_rm_history.grain: One row per relationship manager change per placement

target.placement_rm_history_temporary_ta.purpose: Temporary staging table for ETL processing of historical relationship manager assignments before loading into permanent tables.
target.placement_rm_history_temporary_ta.grain: One row per relationship manager change per placement

quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated.purpose: Stores consolidated QuickBooks income data with aggregated revenue across divisions and category hierarchies.
quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated.grain: One row per account per division per amount type per category hierarchy per report date

quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated_t.purpose: Test version of consolidated income statement fact table from QuickBooks containing aggregated revenue and income transactions.
quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated_t.grain: One row per account per division per amount type per category hierarchy per report date

staging.bqp_employees.purpose: Maintains employee records tracking internal staff members with user relationships and account associations.

staging.resume_scoring_item_bkp.purpose: Backup copy preserving historical item-level resume scoring data before updates or migrations.
staging.resume_scoring_item_bkp.grain: One row per scoring item per application per job per category

staging.bqp_company.purpose: Master table storing company profiles with organizational information, hierarchy, and culture attributes.

staging.classic_industry_types.purpose: Contains mid-level industry classification definitions between broad industries and specific segments with CRM integration details.

staging.resume_scoring_item.purpose: Stores detailed item-by-item comparison scores of resume qualifications against specific job requirements for granular matching analysis.
staging.resume_scoring_item.grain: One scoring item per application per job requirement category

staging.resume_scoring_result.purpose: Stores final aggregated resume scoring results with overall recommendations and hiring assessments for job applications.
staging.resume_scoring_result.grain: One final scoring result per application

staging.resume_scoring_result_bkp.purpose: Backup table storing historical automated resume scoring results for job applications with AI-generated assessments.
staging.resume_scoring_result_bkp.grain: One backup scoring result per application

staging.bullhorn_eligibility.purpose: Tracks candidate eligibility status and compliance requirements for employment screening and verification processes.

staging.bqp_applications.purpose: Stores core job application records with applicant contact details and company preferences.

staging.bqp_candidate_near_miss_report.purpose: Reports on candidates who nearly met hiring criteria but were not selected, providing detailed assessment results for analysis.
staging.bqp_candidate_near_miss_report.grain: One record per near-miss candidate application

staging.new_sheet.purpose: Reference table containing standardized values for candidate and job attributes across professional dimensions for recruitment and talent management.
staging.new_sheet.grain: One reference value per row across multiple attribute categories

staging.classic_computer_operating_syste.purpose: Reference table listing available computer operating systems for technology profiling and compatibility assessment.

staging.rbac_validation_test.purpose: Stores test records for validating role-based access control functionality and permission verification.
staging.rbac_validation_test.grain: One record per RBAC validation test execution

target.relationship_manager_placement_co.purpose: Tracks placements managed by relationship managers linking candidates to client companies with placement status and duration.
target.relationship_manager_placement_co.grain: One placement record per candidate per client corporation per time span
